trackedPackages.reason: Human approval recorded for repo-local Pi CLI pin.

approvals.scope: Repo-local Pi CLI pin for pi-harness-lab only.
approvals.rationale: Human accepted expected powerful CLI behavior for a repo-local Pi CLI.
risksAccepted: CLI can execute processes and mutate files as part of normal operation.
CLI can inspect local process state and project files when invoked by the operator.
mitigations: Use bin/pi-harness for project-local Pi state.
Keep runtime tool policy, provenance, evals, and finish gates enabled.
Install from reviewed vendored tarball with npm lifecycle scripts disabled.
approvals.rollback: Remove the dev dependency, remove this approval and vendor tarball, then rerun package provenance.
